mapper.select:
with tab_1 as (select t1.PROJECT_ID, nvl(sum(case when t1.WORK_ITEM = '品控测试费（功能、性能测试）' or t1.WORK_ITEM = '品控测试费（安全测试）' then t1.AMOUNT else 0.00 end), 0.00) as TESTING_COST, nvl(sum(case when t1.WORK_ITEM = '其中：界面开发与视觉设计费' then t1.AMOUNT else 0.00 end), 0.00) as RESEARCH_COST from ${tableName} t1 where t1.IS_DELETED = 2 and t1.ggodd=2 and t1.PROJECT_ID in
#{item}
group by t1.PROJECT_ID), tab_2 as (select t2.ID projectId, ROUND((NVL(t2.SUBCONTRACT_COST, 0.00) + NVL(t2.GPERSON_IN_COST, 0.00) + NVL(t2.GPERSON_COST, 0.00) + NVL(t2.ENTRUST_COST, 0.00)), 2) as constructCost from DM_PM_PROJ_FEE_STATISTICS t2 where t2.IS_DELETED = 2 and t2.ID in
#{item} ), tab_3 as (select t3.ID, t3.PROJECT_APPROVAL_FROM, t3.PROJECT_COST_CLASS, t3.BUSINESS_SEGMENTS, t3.PROJECT_TYPE from dm_pm_project t3 where t3.IS_DELETED = 2 and t3.ID in
#{item} ), tab_4 as (select tab_1.PROJECT_ID projectId, case when tab_3.BUSINESS_SEGMENTS = 1 and (tab_3.PROJECT_APPROVAL_FROM != 1 or (tab_3.PROJECT_APPROVAL_FROM = 1 and tab_3.PROJECT_COST_CLASS != 1)) then TO_CHAR(tab_1.TESTING_COST, 'FM999999999999999999990.00') when tab_3.BUSINESS_SEGMENTS = 2 and tab_3.PROJECT_TYPE = 6 then TO_CHAR(tab_1.TESTING_COST, 'FM999999999999999999990.00') else '/' end as testingCost, case when tab_3.BUSINESS_SEGMENTS = 1 and (tab_3.PROJECT_APPROVAL_FROM != 1 or (tab_3.PROJECT_APPROVAL_FROM = 1 and tab_3.PROJECT_COST_CLASS != 1)) then TO_CHAR(tab_1.RESEARCH_COST, 'FM999999999999999999990.00') else TO_CHAR(tab_2.constructCost, 'FM999999999999999999990.00') end as researchCost from tab_1 left join tab_2 on tab_2.projectId = tab_1.PROJECT_ID left join tab_3 on tab_3.ID = tab_1.PROJECT_ID) select * from tab_4

SELECT * from FI_OT_ATM_COST WHERE 1=1 AND project_id in
#{item.projectId}

select T1.ATTACHMENT_ID from TOP_ATTACHMENT T1 INNER JOIN TOP_ATTACHMENT_OBJECT_RELATION T2 ON T1.ATTACHMENT_ID = T2.ATTACHMENT_ID WHERE T2.OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND T1.JOB_TYPE_CODE = 'FJ_CBGSB' AND T2.STATE = 1
select UNIQUE_CODE from TOP_ATTACHMENT where STATE = 2 AND ATTACHMENT_ID = #{attachmentId}

SELECT t.after_ver_id FROM ( SELECT t.after_ver_id ,row_number() over (partition by t.project_ID order by t.CREATE_TIME,t.goods desc) dis from dm_pm_project_change t,dm_pm_contract m where t.project_id = #{projectId} AND t.IS_DELETED = 2 ) WHERE DIS = 1
